creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: fluffy
Date: Tue Mar 19 00:39:45 2013
New Revision: 314613
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314613

Log:
  ResidualVM provides engine for playing Grim Fandango,
  Escape from Moneky Island, Myst 3.
  
  WWW: http://residualvm.org/
  
  PR:		ports/176959
  Submitted by:	Alexander Yerenkow <yerenkow@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/games/residualvm/
  head/games/residualvm/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/residualvm/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/residualvm/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/residualvm/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/games/Makefile

Modified: head/games/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/Makefile	Tue Mar 19 00:19:49 2013	(r314612)
+++ head/games/Makefile	Tue Mar 19 00:39:45 2013	(r314613)
@@ -792,6 +792,7 @@
     SUBDIR += redeclipse
     SUBDIR += reminiscence
     SUBDIR += rescue
+    SUBDIR += residualvm
     SUBDIR += rezerwar
     SUBDIR += rfksay
     SUBDIR += rftg

Added: head/games/residualvm/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/games/residualvm/Makefile	Tue Mar 19 00:39:45 2013	(r314613)
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Created by: Alexander Yerenkow <yerenkow@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	residualvm
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.1
+#PORTREVISION=	0
+#PORTEPOCH=	0
+CATEGORIES=	games
+
+MAINTAINER=	yerenkow@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	ResidualVM allows you to indulge with classic games like Grim Fandango
+
+USE_GITHUB=	YES
+GH_ACCOUNT=	residualvm
+GH_PROJECT=	residualvm
+GH_TAGNAME=	0.1.1
+GH_COMMIT=	340bbe3
+
+USE_SDL=	sdl
+HAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
+
+MAN6=		residualvm.6
+NO_MANCOMPRESS=	yes
+
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|{datarootdir}/man|{prefix}/man|' ${WRKSRC}/configure
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/games/residualvm/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/games/residualvm/distinfo	Tue Mar 19 00:39:45 2013	(r314613)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (residualvm-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 5254ad882d9145f49da858700008d4d559259aebf2fea0e327f6fd1eb03c2814
+SIZE (residualvm-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 4968761

Added: head/games/residualvm/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/games/residualvm/pkg-descr	Tue Mar 19 00:39:45 2013	(r314613)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+ResidualVM provides engine for playing Grim Fandango,
+Escape from Moneky Island, Myst 3.
+
+WWW: http://residualvm.org/

Added: head/games/residualvm/pkg-plist

+++ head/games/residualvm/pkg-plist	Tue Mar 19 00:39:45 2013	(r314613)
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+bin/residualvm
+share/pixmaps/residualvm.xpm
+%%DATADIR%%/residualvm-grim-patch.lab
+%%DATADIR%%/modern.zip
